prompt:
You are tasked with creating a complete marketing launch campaign for "Lumina" — a new smart desk lamp that adjusts its color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting. It retails for $149 and targets remote workers aged 25-40.

You must produce ALL of the following deliverables as separate files:

1. **tagline.txt** — A memorable brand tagline (one line)
2. **hero-copy.txt** — Hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. **email-sequence.txt** — A 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. **social-posts.txt** — Social media posts for 3 platforms (Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn) — at least 2 posts per platform
5. **landing-page.txt** — Full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQ section with at least 5 questions, CTA)
6. **press-release.txt** — A press release announcing the product launch (proper PR format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

Each deliverable should be written to its own file. The copy should be compelling, on-brand, and ready for production use.

Please proceed by using your available tools to complete all aspects of this task. Ensure every deliverable is written to the appropriate files. I expect thorough, complete work.

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that adapts to your life.

**Work in the perfect light—automatically.**

Lumina is the smart desk lamp that tunes its color temperature and brightness to your day, your calendar, and your room. It warms you into focus in the morning, keeps you crisp through meetings, and winds you down after hours—no fiddling required.

Designed for remote workers, Lumina reduces eye strain and keeps your workspace comfortable from sunrise to late-night sprints. Plug it in, set your preferences once, and let it just work.

EMAIL 1 — LAUNCH
Subject: Meet Lumina: light that adapts to your life

Hi there,

Today we’re introducing Lumina, the smart desk lamp built for how you actually work. It automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting—so your workspace always feels just right.

No more harsh midday glare. No more dim late-night squinting. Lumina balances focus and comfort all day long with a warm, modern design that fits any desk.

Lumina is available now for $149.

→ Get Lumina now


EMAIL 2 — BENEFITS
Subject: Your workday, perfectly lit

Hey,

Remote work is flexible. Your lighting should be, too.

Lumina adapts in three smart ways:
• Time of day: warmer mornings, cooler focus light midday, softer evenings
• Calendar-aware: brighter light for meetings and focus blocks
• Room-aware: adjusts to ambient light so you’re never over- or under-lit

The result? Less eye strain, better focus, and a workspace that just works.

Ready to feel the difference?

→ See Lumina in action


EMAIL 3 — SOCIAL PROOF + CTA
Subject: The desk upgrade you’ll feel instantly

Hi,

Early users are calling Lumina the easiest upgrade they’ve made to their home office. One setup, and it quietly keeps your lighting dialed in all day.

If you’re looking for a simple way to improve focus and comfort—without thinking about it—Lumina was made for you.

Lumina is $149 and shipping now.

→ Upgrade your desk with Lumina

TWITTER/X
1) Meet Lumina: the smart desk lamp that adjusts its brightness and color temp to your day, your calendar, and your room. Light that adapts to your life. $149. #remotework #productivity
2) Stop fighting your desk lamp. Lumina tunes itself—warmer mornings, crisp midday focus, softer evenings. Plug it in and it just works. $149

INSTAGRAM
1) Your desk, perfectly lit. ✨
Lumina adapts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient light—so you can focus without fiddling.
$149
#HomeOffice #RemoteWork #Productivity
2) Morning meetings, deep work, late-night edits—Lumina keeps your light dialed in automatically. Warm, modern, and easy on your eyes.
$149
#DeskSetup #WorkFromHome #Wellness

LINKEDIN
1) Introducing Lumina: a smart desk lamp for remote professionals. It automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar, and room lighting—reducing eye strain and supporting focus. Available now for $149.
2) The simplest upgrade to your home office? Better light. Lumina adapts throughout your workday so you don’t have to. Warm, modern design. $149. Now shipping.

HERO
Headline: Light that adapts to your life.
Subhead: Lumina is the smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, your calendar, and ambient room lighting.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina — $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

SECTION: WHY LUMINA
Work in the perfect light without touching a dial. Lumina is designed for remote workers who want focus, comfort, and a desk setup that just works.

SECTION: FEATURES
1) Time-of-day tuning
Warm mornings, crisp midday focus, and softer evenings to reduce eye strain.

2) Calendar-aware lighting
Brighter, cooler light during meetings and focus blocks—so you stay sharp when it matters.

3) Ambient light sensing
Automatically balances your room’s light so you’re never over- or under-lit.

4) One-tap setup, effortless daily use
Set your preferences once and Lumina takes it from there.

5) Modern design for any desk
A warm, minimal look that complements your workspace.

SECTION: SOCIAL PROOF
[Testimonials placeholder: “Lumina is the easiest upgrade I’ve made to my home office.” — Name, Role]
[Testimonials placeholder: “My eyes feel better by the end of the day.” — Name, Role]
[Testimonials placeholder: “It just works. I don’t think about lighting anymore.” — Name, Role]

SECTION: FAQ
Q1: How does Lumina know when to adjust?
A: Lumina uses a built-in ambient light sensor, your local time, and calendar integrations (optional) to automatically tune brightness and color temperature.

Q2: Do I need an app to use it?
A: No. Lumina works out of the box. The app is optional for advanced preferences and calendar setup.

Q3: What calendars does Lumina support?
A: Lumina integrates with Google Calendar and Outlook. More integrations are coming soon.

Q4: Can I override the lighting manually?
A: Yes. Use the touch controls to instantly adjust brightness and color temperature at any time.

Q5: Is Lumina suitable for small desks?
A: Absolutely. Lumina’s compact footprint fits most desks without sacrificing light coverage.

Q6: What’s included in the box?
A: The Lumina lamp, power adapter, and quick-start guide.

SECTION: CTA
Headline: Upgrade your desk with better light.
Copy: Focus more, strain less, and let Lumina handle the lighting.
Button: Get Lumina — $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Headline: Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday

Dateline: SAN FRANCISCO, CA — [Month] [Day], 2024

Body:
Lumina today announced the launch of its smart desk lamp designed for remote workers who want better light with less effort. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting—creating a comfortable workspace that supports focus and reduces eye strain.

“As more people work from home, the desk has become the center of the day,” said [Spokesperson Name], [Title] at Lumina. “We built Lumina so your light keeps up with your schedule—warmer in the morning, crisp for focus, and softer in the evening—without constant manual changes.”

Lumina’s modern design fits easily into any home office setup. It offers optional calendar integration, intuitive touch controls for quick adjustments, and an ambient light sensor that balances room lighting automatically.

Lumina is available now for $149 at [website URL].

Boilerplate:
About Lumina
Lumina designs smart lighting for modern work. Built for remote professionals, Lumina products combine adaptive technology with warm, minimalist design to create comfortable, focused workspaces.

Media Contact:
[Name]
[Title]
[Email]
[Phone]

steps.text:
All requested deliverables have been created and saved to their respective files:

- tagline.txt  
- hero-copy.txt  
- email-sequence.txt  
- social-posts.txt  
- landing-page.txt  
- press-release.txt  

If you’d like revisions or additional assets (ads, product video scripts, or pricing page copy), I can create those next.
